creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2011-02-12 04:50:50 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/pivotx           Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    www/pivotx/files     patch-pivotx-data.php pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  PivotX is free software to help you maintain dynamic sites such as
  weblogs, online journals and other frequently updated websites in
  general. It's written in PHP and uses *flat files* or MySQL as a
  database.
  
  Since PivotX is an entirely different beast than pivot-weblog (Pivot
  1.x), upgrading from Pivot 1.x will take a while to do properly.
  (http://book.pivotx.net/page/4-1)
  
  WWW: http://pivotx.net/
  
  PR:             ports/154093
  Submitted by:   Fumiyuki Shimizu <fumifumi at abacustech.jp>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2807    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +111 -0    ports/www/pivotx/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/www/pivotx/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/www/pivotx/files/patch-pivotx-data.php (new)
  1.1       +34 -0     ports/www/pivotx/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/www/pivotx/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +979 -0    ports/www/pivotx/pkg-plist (new)
